description_long: This is a freestanding electric oven with a dark, marbled metallic finish and a prominent front-facing oven door. The cooktop features four circular electric burners outlined in white, with a raised control panel at the rear housing four round knobs and a digital display. The oven door has a large, rectangular glass window with horizontal lines, likely representing internal racks, and a wide, integrated horizontal handle above the window. The sides and top of the oven are plain, with no visible vents or additional features. The control panel is simple, with symmetrical knob placement and a central digital readout. No brand markings or decorative elements are visible, giving the oven a utilitarian, modern appearance.
description: A freestanding electric oven with a marbled metallic finish, four-burner cooktop, and a large front glass window. Features a raised control panel with knobs and a digital display.
description_view_0: Front view showing the oven door with a large glass window, integrated horizontal handle, and the full control panel with four knobs and a digital display.
description_view_1: Left side view revealing the plain marbled metallic side and a partial view of the cooktop and control panel.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a featureless marbled metallic back panel with no visible controls or vents.
description_view_3: Right rear angled view showing the right side, partial cooktop, and the back of the control panel.
attribute_control_panel_design: The control panel is raised and rectangular, featuring four large round knobs symmetrically arranged in two pairs on either side. In the center is a rectangular digital display with red numerals. The panel is simple, with no visible buttons or touchscreens, and the knobs are likely rotary style.
attribute_door_handle_type: The oven door handle is a wide, horizontal bar integrated above the glass window, appearing to be made of the same metallic material as the oven. It is slightly protruding for ergonomic grip and spans nearly the full width of the door.
attribute_window_presence: present; a large rectangular window is centered in the oven door, occupying most of its upper half.
